name: 马尔库斯·戴劳 | 联邦调查局（FBI）人质营救队
nameZh: 马尔库斯·戴劳 | 联邦调查局（FBI）人质营救队
descriptionEn: There's no detail too small for Markus Delrow. Equipment, battle plans, oppositional tactics—you name it—and he's already thought of it twice. Being two steps ahead is what he does best, and Delrow takes pride in being the brains of the operation. All that's left is to execute.
descriptionZh: 马尔库斯·戴劳是个心思缜密的人。装备，战斗计划，对敌战术，只要你能想到的，他会比你多考虑两步。 戴劳最擅长的就是占尽先机，所以他很自豪能成为行动的智商担当。 剩下的，去执行就是了。
